text:
INCIDENT REPORT #005
Facility: Plant 2 - Gary
Asset: Cooling Tower Fan CTF-6
Severity: HIGH

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed a sharp rise in vibration amplitude
on the Cooling Tower Fan CTF-6. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 6.8 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause was determined to be a failed lubrication pump.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Replacement parts ordered and repair scheduled.
